chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 2389 of 2015 CP D 3251 of 2018 CP D 4405 of 2018 ___________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) ___________________________________________________________ 1. For hearing of main case. 26.03.2025 Mr. M. Aadil Saeed, advocate for the petitioners. Mr. Muhabbat Hussain Awan, advocate for the respondents 2, 3, 4, 5 & 6. Mr. Muhammad Siddique, advocate holding brief for Mr. Sardar Zafar Hussain, advocate for the respondent. Mr. Abdul Basit Kazi, advocate holding brief for Dr. Shah Nawaz Memon, advocate for the respondent. Ms. Mehreen Ibrahim, Deputy Attorney General. Learned counsel for the petitioners states that finalization of respective assessment is pending due to these petitions. He states that he is entitled to benefit as determined vide judgment dated 02.08.2016 passed in Civil Appeal No.847 of 2009 and judgment reported as 2016 SCMR 1448. He states that department may be directed to finalize the respective assessment in accordance with law vide speaking order and after providing opportunity of hearing to the petitioners and pending aforesaid no coercive action / realization of security be perpetrated against petitioner. Learned counsel for the respondent department articulates no cavil to the aforesaid and states that petitions may be disposed of in the aforesaid terms. Order accordingly. Office is instructed to place copy hereof in each connected file. Judge Judge Khuhro/PA
